reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary) triggers. The vulnerability requires loading a malicious local configuration file with MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK > 4096. According to BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json, local_validator configuration is SEMI_TRUSTED and explicitly out-of-scope: 'Configuration issues requiring operator error are typically out-of-scope'. There is no P2P attack path; this solely relies on operators choosing to load a compromised/faulty config file, which falls outside the security model for the bug bounty program.
